hero.title: Heavenly rainforest escape.
hero.subtitle: Forest air, mountain calm, and a curated collection of premium houses in Dilijan for romantic weekends, elegant family retreats, and quiet resets.

featured.title: A curated retreat collection with space to breathe.
featured.subtitle: Distinct homes with cedar warmth, mountain stillness, and a guest journey designed to feel polished from the first click.

story.title: Private retreats with forest texture and a calmer booking rhythm.
story.body: Dilijan offers softer light, cooler air, and a slower pace between the trees. Aygoot pairs that setting with clear communication, thoughtful review, and a more elevated rental experience.

experience.title: Built to feel premium before, during, and after booking.
experience.subtitle: Aygoot is designed like a hospitality product, not a generic listing wall.
items: Booking requests stay clear on mobile, with quick review and calm communication.
Each house is curated for atmosphere, privacy, and a stronger sense of place in Dilijan.
Warm cedar, moss, stone, and forest tones shape a more memorable stay journey.

trust.title: Simple for guests, powerful for careful hosting.

items.title: Availability is reviewed carefully
items.description: Aygoot begins with a request-first flow so each stay can be checked before confirmation, avoiding the bluntness of instant inventory.

items.title: Guest or account booking
items.description: Send a request as a guest or keep your stay history in a personal account without adding friction to the first booking.

items.title: Thoughtful communication
items.description: Every booking step is mirrored by clear email updates, so guests always know what is confirmed, pending, or next.

cta.title: Choose a quieter base in Dilijan.
cta.description: Browse the full collection, compare the atmosphere of each house, and send a stay request in a few careful steps.
cta.cardBody: Distinct houses, refined surfaces, and a booking flow that feels personal from the first message.
